title: Refund processing timelines
content: Refunds for cancelled orders are initiated within 24 hours of cancellation and reflect in the original payment method within 5-7 business days. Refunds to wallet are instant. Refunds for orders paid via COD are processed via bank transfer and require the customer's bank details.

title: Order cancellation policy
content: Orders can be cancelled free of charge before they are shipped. Once shipped, cancellation is treated as a return and is subject to the return policy. Cancelling a subscription stops the next billing cycle but does not refund the current cycle.

title: Payment failure troubleshooting
content: Payment failures are commonly caused by insufficient balance, bank server timeouts, or incorrect OTP entry. If an amount was debited but the order shows as failed, the amount is auto-reversed within 5-7 business days as per the refund policy. Customers should avoid retrying payment more than twice within 10 minutes.

title: Subscription plan upgrades and downgrades
content: Plan upgrades take effect immediately with prorated billing for the remaining cycle. Downgrades take effect at the start of the next billing cycle to avoid mid-cycle feature loss. Enterprise plan changes require account manager approval.

title: Account lockout and password recovery
content: Accounts are temporarily locked after 5 failed login attempts for 30 minutes. Password recovery links are valid for 15 minutes. Two-factor authentication reset requires identity verification via registered email and phone.

title: Data export and account deletion
content: Customers can export their data as a CSV or JSON archive from account settings, available within 24 hours of request. Account deletion is permanent after a 14-day grace period, during which the request can be reversed by logging back in.

title: Shipping delays and tracking
content: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days; delays beyond 7 days should be escalated to the logistics partner. Tracking updates may lag by up to 12 hours behind actual movement. Lost shipments are eligible for full refund or reshipment after a 3-day investigation window.

title: Return and exchange eligibility
content: Items are eligible for return within 7 days of delivery if unused and in original packaging. Exchanges for size or color are processed as a return plus new order to avoid inventory mismatch. Return refunds follow the standard refund timeline.

title: Billing dispute and chargeback handling
content: Customers disputing a charge should first raise it with support before initiating a bank chargeback, since chargebacks freeze the account pending resolution and can take 45-60 days. Legitimate disputes are refunded directly without needing a chargeback.

title: Service outage communication protocol
content: During a confirmed service outage, status updates are posted every 30 minutes on the status page. Affected customers on paid plans are proactively credited a pro-rated amount for downtime exceeding 2 hours without needing to raise a ticket.

title: API rate limit and integration errors
content: Free tier API keys are limited to 60 requests per minute; Enterprise keys scale to 2000 requests per minute. 429 errors indicate rate limiting, not account suspension. Repeated integration failures should be checked against the API status page before escalation.

title: Escalation and priority support criteria
content: Tickets are escalated to Tier 2 when unresolved after 24 hours, or immediately for enterprise accounts, security concerns, or repeated billing errors. High-severity tickets receive a response within 1 hour during business hours.

title: Loyalty credits and referral rewards
content: Referral credits are applied after the referred customer's first successful payment, typically within 48 hours. Credits expire 12 months after issuance and cannot be combined with subscription discounts.

title: Fraud and unauthorized transaction reporting
content: Suspected unauthorized transactions should be reported immediately; the account is temporarily frozen pending investigation, typically resolved within 72 hours. Confirmed fraud cases are refunded in full and reported to the payment processor.
